text: This is an XML Editor/Manipulator written in
, and the GUI was made with
The idea itself might not be super original, and it was made for our
college course, but I think the real beauty of this project stems from the project structure.

I spent a great deal of effort researching the best practices for C++ projects to make the most modular design and structure possible, especially since the project was implemented in phases so I needed to account for future extensions.
This is also a team project, and I was the leader of the 8 other computer engineers with me in the group.

Aside from the project structure and design, I was also responsible for assigning roles, giving an outline of the implementation for each function, troubleshooting and debugging any problems encountered by my team.
